rooms.description: A cold exam room. Emily is here, watching you closely.

npcs.name: emily
npcs.description: A tired nurse in bloodstained scrubs, trying to hold herself together.

dialogues.text: Emily looks exhausted, but relieved that you are awake. "If we can restore power in the generator room, we might still have a chance. And if you see Dr. Zaun... don't listen to him."

rooms.description: A ruined central lobby with overturned furniture and old blood on the floor.
A dark generator room filled with diesel fumes and broken machinery.

enemies.name: ripper
enemies.description: A hunched, doglike infected prowls near the generator.

interactables.name: generator
interactables.description: A damaged backup generator connected to the facility power grid.
interactables.successMessage: You pour the fuel into the generator and restart the system. The lights flicker back to life.
interactables.failureMessage: The generator won't start without fuel.

rooms.description: A damaged research lab with broken terminals and scattered notes.

enemies.name: clicker
enemies.description: A blind creature stands motionless near the examination table, clicking softly.

interactables.name: terminal
interactables.description: A security terminal with a cracked but active screen.
interactables.successMessage: The terminal flickers to life. ACCESS CODE REQUIRED.

rooms.description: A sealed laboratory where Dr. Zaun waits in the shadows.

npcs.name: zaun
npcs.description: Dr. Zaun stands before the containment tank, calm and unreadable.

dialogues.text: Dr. Zaun steps forward. "You finally made it. You think this is a disaster... but it's evolution."
Zaun watches you silently as the chamber trembles around you.
"So... you survived them all. Now make your choice."

rooms.description: A final escape route leading outside the facility.

items.name: notebook
items.description: The notebook is written in your own handwriting. One line is underlined twice: 'Find the truth. Trust no one. Especially not Dr. Zaun.' In the margin you see a number sequence: 7314.

items.name: flashlight
items.description: A flashlight with moderate battery life.

items.name: bandages
items.description: Clean bandages that may be useful later.

items.name: scrap metal
items.description: A piece of scrap metal. Could be used to make a weapon.

items.name: fuel canister
items.description: A heavy fuel canister used to restore generator power.

items.name: research notes
items.description: The notes describe NV-1 as an experimental gene therapy that failed catastrophically. One page mentions a terminal override tied to internal security protocols.

items.name: keycard
items.description: A security keycard with high-level clearance.
